decisions.decision: The controller-owned lane identity index is the sole current identity authority for W1-W6. All lanes share phaseStartSha a32f509e6d9bd31ba2135940e336729bf90c3d93 and current integration commit 0bf8f2d105def1fa34dd8dedfb8d345d720dc35e.
Historical producer, review, audit, ledger and baseline records remain immutable evidence but no longer supply current lane identity, disposition, decision, or integration status.
a32f509e6d9bd31ba2135940e336729bf90c3d93 is the one true Phase 0 phaseStartSha. A lane source base, remediation base, review base, or integration commit is never a substitute.
Adopt W1 v9 as the current W1 evidence bundle at integration commit 89c1358925033d480bcfe3bdfee6c899df556431.
Adopt the approved W2 targeted A1 evidence bundle at integration commit 0bf8f2d105def1fa34dd8dedfb8d345d720dc35e while superseding its incorrect phaseStartSha claim.
Adopt W3 and W5 evidence as a compatible evidence-only pair; retain all recorded later-phase and final-topology limitations.
Adopt the approved paired W4/W6 characterization bundle without treating it as final-image admission, hosted mutation readiness, or terminal implementation.
No historical file is rewritten. Supersession changes only which controller-owned record is authoritative for current state and interpretation.
